command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1053.002 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1053.002'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1053.002 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2

osquery.name: t1053_002_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

osquery.name: t1053_002_at_jobs
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '/var/spool/cron/atjobs/%' OR path LIKE '/var/spool/at/%';
